mapper.sql: id, product_id, product_name, product_pic, seckill_price, original_price, seckill_stock, limit_count, start_time, end_time, status, activity_id
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sms_seckill_product WHERE delete_status = 0 ORDER BY start_time DESC
SELECT FROM sms_seckill_product WHERE delete_status = 0 AND status = 1 AND now() >= start_time AND now() <= end_time ORDER BY start_time DESC
SELECT FROM sms_seckill_product WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_status = 0
SELECT FROM sms_seckill_product WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND delete_status = 0
